form.formComment: Useful gelding. Resumes off a 34 day letup. Last start finished fourth of 11 starters at Stratford-On-Avon on March 9 over 3300m, on slow going 11 len behind Let It Rain carrying 76kg at $9. Before that pulled up at Newbury on February 7 over 3300m. Rates well and can feature in the finish again.

form.formComment: Resuming today after three months. Finished off last preparation 6 of 7 starters at Kempton Park January 10 over 3200m, 43 len behind Baron Noir with 74.5kg at $13. Previous preparation first-up won by 12 len Uttoxeter October 17 over 3200m defeating Purple Owl with 70kg at $2. Worth including.

form.formComment: Useful type. Freshened for 51 days. Last run made some head-way from midfield; finished second in a small field at this track on February 20 over 4000m, in the wet; a neck behind El Gavilan with 75kg at $5. Run before won by 1.3 len this track on January 8 over 4000m in the wet defeating Pachacuti with 76.5kg at $5.50 in a hurdle. Continues to improve. Main contender with repeat of latest.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign 5 of 8 runners at Chepstow December 6 over 4700m, 24 len behind The Price Of Peace with 73kg at $12. When resuming last campaign 10 of 11 runners at Listowel September 25 over 3218m, 59 len behind Heads Up with 72.5kg at $15. Looks safely held this tougher line-up fresh.

form.formComment: Racing well. Freshened for 53 days. Last to post a big 4.5 len win. Ludlow on February 18 over 4260m on rain affected going defeating Fresh Kicks carrying 74kg at $5.50 in a hurdle. The start before that; raced on the pace then finished second of 12 runners at Fontwell Park on January 11 over 3800m, slow track; 1.0 len behind Legendary Luke carrying 71kg at $13. Opened winning account now and should go close again.

form.formComment: Comes off a 30 day let-up. Last run finished sixth of 7 runners at Doncaster on March 13 over 4200m, 24 len behind Saracen Beau with 72.5kg at $4.20. Before that finished third of 12 starters at Wincanton on January 15 over 4000m, slow track; 5 len behind Lucky Bere with 71kg at $7.50. Rates highly on best form and is worth forgiving.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a about 18 months break. Finished off last campaign 11 of 15 runners at Cheltenham November 15 2024 over 3300m, 19 len behind Wreckless Eric with 73kg at $7. First ever start ran 13 of 16 starters at Aintree in the G2 Nickel Coin Mares' Standard Open NH Flat Race April 11 2024 over 3400m, slow track; 19 len behind Diva Luna with 67kg at $41. Rates a place hope only on run before a spell.
